message:
feat: integrate snapshot engine into watcher lifecycle

Wires the SnapshotEngine into run_watcher() so session state is
automatically captured and persisted throughout the watcher's lifetime.

Startup integration (main.rs):
  - When config.snapshots.enabled, creates an Arc<SnapshotEngine>
  - Spawns a tokio task running engine.run_periodic() with a pane
    discovery closure that calls wezterm_handle_with_timeout()
  - Respects the watcher's shutdown_flag for clean termination

Shutdown integration (main.rs):
  - Before tearing down the observation runtime, captures a final
    shutdown checkpoint with a 5-second timeout
  - Logs pane count and byte size on success, warns on failure
  - Falls back to mark_shutdown() if no panes are available

New method: SnapshotEngine::shutdown_checkpoint() (snapshot_engine.rs):
  - Wraps capture(Shutdown) + mark_shutdown() in a single timeout
  - Returns Ok(None) on dedup skip or timeout (non-fatal)
  - Always attempts mark_shutdown() even on capture failure,
    ensuring the session record is marked clean regardless

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
